'''loladhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:huffingly|huffingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huffingly|huffingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| loladhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:loladhithi|loladhithi]] || [[word:loladhiji|loladhiji]] || [[word:loladhishi|loladhishi]] || [[word:loladhiki|loladhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:loladhuthuthu|loladhuthuthu]] || [[word:loladhujuju|loladhujuju]] || [[word:loladhushushu|loladhushushu]] || [[word:loladhukuku|loladhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:loladhuthu|loladhuthu]] || [[word:loladhuju|loladhuju]] || [[word:loladhushu|loladhushu]] || [[word:loladhuku|loladhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:loladhufthuf|loladhufthuf]] || [[word:loladhufjuf|loladhufjuf]] || [[word:loladhufshuf|loladhufshuf]] || [[word:loladhufkuf|loladhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:loladhethe|loladhethe]] || [[word:loladheje|loladheje]] || [[word:loladheshe|loladheshe]] || [[word:loladheke|loladheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:loladhothotho|loladhothotho]] || [[word:loladhojojo|loladhojojo]] || [[word:loladhoshosho|loladhoshosho]] || [[word:loladhokoko|loladhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:loladhotho|loladhotho]] || [[word:loladhojo|loladhojo]] || [[word:loladhosho|loladhosho]] || [[word:loladhoko|loladhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:loladhofthof|loladhofthof]] || [[word:loladhofjof|loladhofjof]] || [[word:loladhofshof|loladhofshof]] || [[word:loladhofkof|loladhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfthĂŻf|loladhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfjĂŻf|loladhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfshĂŻf|loladhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfkĂŻf|loladhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|loladhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|loladhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|loladhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|loladhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfthĂŻf|loladhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfjĂŻf|loladhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfshĂŻf|loladhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfkĂŻf|loladhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfthĂŻf|loladhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfjĂŻf|loladhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfshĂŻf|loladhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:loladhĂŻfkĂŻf|loladhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:loladhĂŠthĂŠ|loladhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:loladhĂŠjĂŠ|loladhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:loladhĂŠshĂŠ|loladhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:loladhĂŠkĂŠ|loladhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:loladhathatha|loladhathatha]] || [[word:loladhajaja|loladhajaja]] || [[word:loladhashasha|loladhashasha]] || [[word:loladhakaka|loladhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:loladhatha|loladhatha]] || [[word:loladhaja|loladhaja]] || [[word:loladhasha|loladhasha]] || [[word:loladhaka|loladhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:loladhafthaf|loladhafthaf]] || [[word:loladhafjaf|loladhafjaf]] || [[word:loladhafshaf|loladhafshaf]] || [[word:loladhafkaf|loladhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:loladhasha|loladhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:loladhshĂ«sha|loladhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loladhrosha|loladhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loladhmusha|loladhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:loladhyasha|loladhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololadhnkshĂ«sha|gololadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololadhnkrosha|gololadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololadhnkmusha|gololadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololadhnkyasha|gololadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lolaladhasha|lolaladhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lolaladhshĂ«sha|lolaladhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lolaladhrosha|lolaladhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lolaladhmusha|lolaladhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lolaladhyasha|lolaladhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololaladhnkshĂ«sha|gololaladhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololaladhnkrosha|gololaladhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololaladhnkmusha|gololaladhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololaladhnkyasha|gololaladhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lelĂŠdhasha|lelĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lelĂŠdhshĂ«sha|lelĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lelĂŠdhrosha|lelĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lelĂŠdhmusha|lelĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lelĂŠdhyasha|lelĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golelĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|golelĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golelĂŠdhnkrosha|golelĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golelĂŠdhnkmusha|golelĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golelĂŠdhnkyasha|golelĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lolfadhasha|lolfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lolfadhshĂ«sha|lolfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lolfadhrosha|lolfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lolfadhmusha|lolfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lolfadhyasha|lolfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololfadhnkshĂ«sha|gololfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololfadhnkrosha|gololfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololfadhnkmusha|gololfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololfadhnkyasha|gololfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
